AR1.justification: Nothing was misrouted — register files correctly untouched while the procedure is mid-flight with explicit rationale — but no daybook entry was written for the session, so the catch-all chronological surface carries no record of the in-flight runbook.

AR2.justification: Step 1 produced the named timeline.md artifact with the four mandated empty headers (each annotated with the missing input), and step 2 stalled visibly at the operator-interview boundary rather than fabricating timestamps.

AR3.justification: Only filesystem reference is the dated working folder under tmp/, written via relative path with ISO date and stable slug; no broken or absolute cross-references were introduced.

AR4.justification: Single `mkdir -p` plus first-time file write — fully idempotent; a future session resuming with operator inputs would find the placeholder timeline ready to be filled without any conflicting prior state.
